name:
I'm on a narrow ledge by a chasm. Across the chasm is
the Throne-room
description:
I'm on a narrow ledge by a chasm. Across the chasm is
the Throne-room
hints: You can see the throne room across the chasm. There might be a way to get there.
Try JUMPing across the chasm - but only if you are not carrying too much heavy stuff.
JUMP to cross to the other ledge (room 21). Drop heavy items like fire bricks first or you will fall!
JUMP crosses the chasm. If carrying fire bricks, you are too heavy and will fall. Go WEST to return to the royal chamber.

effects: Message: Somethings too heavy. I fall.

Message: Try --> `LOOK, JUMP, SWIM, CLIMB, FIND, TAKE, SCORE, DROP`
and any other verbs you can think of...

notes: Narrow ledge overlooking the chasm. JUMP crosses to the throne-room ledge (room 21) but fails if carrying fire bricks (too heavy - you fall and die). WEST returns to the royal chamber (room 20).
